title: Nutella bread pudding – treat yourself

seo.title: Nutella bread pudding - treat yourself - Marinda Kook

html:
Tonight it’s bitterly cold in Hopefield. I got the urge to make something comforting. Chocolate is wonderfully forgiving – even for the cold.

 

  1. 8 croissants
  2. 1 jar Nutella chocolate spread
  3. 500 ml cream
  4. 250 ml milk
  5. 4 eggs
  6. 5 ml vanilla essence
  7. 125 ml castor sugar

NOW:

  • cut the croissants in half and spread them thickly with the NutellaLayer the spread croissants like roof tiles, overlapping each other, in an ovenproof dish.

Mix the cream, milk, eggs, vanilla essence and castor sugar well.

Pour it over the croissants. Let it stand for 60 minutes.

Bake it for 40 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

Take it out of the oven and eat it with custard or ice cream.
